[Rerun Pick-Up Recruitment Preview]

A Rerun Pick-Up Recruitment will begin on 9/19 (Tue)!
Pick-Up Students: 3★ Azusa, 2★ Hanako

Pick-Up Recruitment Schedule: 9/19 (Tue) 2:00 AM – 9/26 (Tue) 1:59 AM (UTC)
